title: Mesophlebion hallieri
taxonomy: Mesophlebion hallieri is classified as a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Mesophlebion, which is a group of climbing ferns. Mesophlebion hallieri is native to the tropical regions of Asia. Its classification also includes the family level, where it is placed under the division Pteridophyta, the class Polypodiopsida, and the order Polypodiales.
